---
title: "Images of BoHeMIa"
description: "Math For All (MFA) Conference Poster on Bounded Height Matrices of Integers"
author: ""
resources: 
  - MFA_poster.pdf
  - bohemia.png
date: "2024-04-05"
categories: [Python] 
image: "bohemia.png"     
link: "MFA_poster.pdf"
---
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=MFA_poster.pdf">

[Click here if you are not redirected automatically](MFA_poster.pdf)
